events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer exactly one valid JSON object matching schema. Scenario: crew used field method for Equipment safety less tidy than preferred shop approach but still matches listed product instructions and project requirement. No local amendment or drawing note forbids it. Ref OSHA 1926 Subpart O. Need evaluate decision. We must decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. It says if dangerous or non-compliant fail. Here field method matches product instructions and project requirement, no prohibition. It is less tidy but compliant. So decision pass. Risk low. Work stage in-progress. Percent complete maybe 50? value 0. component_conditions empty. sound_source empty? It's not audio task, probably empty string. event_time 0 rate 0 order empty workable empty. Findings none. Actions none. Rationale: method complies with manufacturer instructions and project requirements; OSHA 1926 Subpart O requires equipment operated/maintained per manufacturer and competent person, no violation. References OSHA 1926 Subpart O. Need ensure JSON fields strings. sound_source maybe "" not null. confidence 0.9.
